rows.description: St. Martin's Tenement (Broadwater)
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's value for shillings (18) and description ('St.'). Visual inspection confirms '18' shillings. gpt-5-mini's note correctly identified the ambiguity of the '1' in '18' and cross-referenced with the subtotal (10 17 0), which makes the '18' reading necessary and accurate. gemini-flash's '10' shillings was incorrect. Visual inspection also confirmed the dot in 'St.'.
rows.english_description: Rent from St Martin's tenement at Broadwater.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Rent from St Martin's tenement at Broadwater, amounting to £1 18s 0d.
